Summary: W3 (source outline aggressive) + W4 (rtk smart, feature-gated) implemented per plan rtk-md-completion-2026-05-27.

Changes:
- crates/pi-shell/src/minimizer/config.rs: pub enum OutlineLevel { Default, Aggressive }; MinimizerConfig.source_outline_level, ai_smart_enabled (default false), ai_smart_provider (default "deepseek"); MinimizerOptions + SettingsFile (TOML overlay) parse all three.
- crates/pi-shell/src/minimizer/filters/listing.rs: compact_source_outline now takes (input, path, level). Aggressive level adds strip_brace_bodies (rs/ts/tsx/js/jsx/go) and strip_python_bodies (py). Only function/method/constructor bodies stripped; container decls (class/struct/enum/trait/impl/interface/namespace/module) preserved so inner method signatures stay visible. 6 new aggressive-outline unit tests.
- crates/pi-shell/src/minimizer/filters/mod.rs: register pub mod ai_smart;
- crates/pi-shell/src/minimizer/filters/ai_smart.rs (NEW): feature-gated maybe_summarize() with pinned deepseek-v4-flash, 5s timeout, 200 max tokens, 8 KB input cap, OMP_AI_SMART_API_KEY env var, pipe/compound parent bypass, single retry on transient, fail-closed sanitize_summary that strips ANSI / ; / backticks / & per AC-C4. 10 unit tests cover disabled/empty/oversize/pipe/compound/budget/missing-key/sanitize/extract.
- crates/pi-shell/src/minimizer/engine.rs: apply() post-step apply_ai_smart_overlay (cfg(feature=ai-smart)) runs after apply_identity returns. Resets per-apply budget on entry. Returns ai-smart MinimizerOutput when summarizer returns Some.
- crates/pi-shell/Cargo.toml: [features] ai-smart = ["dep:reqwest"]; reqwest 0.12 optional with rustls-tls/json/blocking.
- crates/pi-shell/tests/minimizer_chain_flag_matrix.rs (NEW): 10 cross-cutting rows for W3 (flag-rich cat, chain mode segmented, malformed input no-panic, output purity, default passthrough) and W4 (runtime-flag-off passthrough, pipe parent skipped, deepseek-v4-flash + endpoint + API_KEY env + 8 KB cap pinned constants).
- packages/coding-agent/src/exec/bash-executor.ts: buildMinimizerOptions surfaces sourceOutlineLevel and aiSmartEnabled/aiSmartProvider into native MinimizerOptions.
- packages/coding-agent/src/config/settings-schema.ts: shellMinimizer.sourceOutlineLevel ("default"/"aggressive"), shellMinimizer.aiSmartEnabled, shellMinimizer.aiSmartProvider; ShellMinimizerSettings interface extended.
- packages/natives/native/index.d.ts: mirror napi MinimizerOptions extension (sourceOutlineLevel, aiSmartEnabled, aiSmartProvider).
